title: Missing newline above progress line during streaming
description: During streaming, no visual gap between chat content and the progress spinner. The trailing blank from the entry is held back (holdback=1). Current fix attempt: progress_gap_rows=1 adds a constant gap row. Needs manual verification.

logs.msg: Replaces tk-xjmf. Current state: holdback reduced from 2 to 1, progress_gap_rows=1. Needs manual verification.
